nodes.label: Paper Trading Engine ==================== Real-time paper trading system that:
Core paper trading engine.          Orchestrates:     1. Signal generation fr
Stop paper trading and close all positions.
Process a new signal from a model with thread/concurrency safety.
Update current price, calculate P&L, and manage trailing stops.
Execute a new trade with dynamic weight-adjusted confidence.
Close current open position and feed result back to weight adjuster.
Calculate position size using Dynamic Fractional Kelly criterion.
Check if trading can continue based on risk limits.
Calculate win rate from closed trades.
Calculate Sharpe ratio from portfolio snapshots.
Calculate maximum drawdown from portfolio values.
